name: pit-duplicate-records
notes: Duplicate records must not be double-counted in baseline selection. A0 (impl 500) and A1 (impl 404) are two distinct runs. Re-running at A1's identical tree produces a byte-identical record => the SAME content-addressed run_id (a duplicate). previous-comparable for the current run must resolve its baseline to A0 (the real prior distinct run) and report the genuine 500->404 updated_fail -- never mistake the duplicate of the current run for a baseline (which would collapse to a self-comparison with no transitions).
